login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Access Laundry OS
login.error: Login failed. Check your phone and password.

signup.title: Create your customer account
signup.subtitle: Customer signup only. Staff and admin accounts are not created here.
signup.success: Account created successfully. Please sign in.
signup.customerOnlyNote: This signup route is for customers only.

forbidden.title: Access not allowed
forbidden.subtitle: This portal is not available for your current role.
forbidden.body: Use the correct portal for your account or sign in again with the right credentials.

componentsPage.title: Mimo UI Kit
componentsPage.subtitle: Chapter 7.2 component library gallery.
componentsPage.useForDashboards: Use for dashboards, panels, and forms.

help.label: Need help?
help.publicBody: Find setup guidance, order help, and direct support.
help.orderBody: Use this help entry when you need support on a specific order.
help.taskBody: Use this help entry when a pickup, dropoff, or stop proof needs attention.
help.financeBody: Use this help entry for payout, balance, or settlement questions.
help.generalBody: Use this help entry when you need guidance for the current screen.
help.adminDevBody: Use the help center for access, workflow, and operational guidance.

customer.firstRunBody: Complete your first setup in two short steps, then start placing orders.
customer.stepOneBody: Pick the language you want to use right now. You can change it later.
customer.stepTwoBody: Check your name and phone so your first order flow starts clearly.
customer.homeBody: Track your active order, start a new request, and get help from one clear place.
customer.ordersBody: Your active and recent orders will appear here.

driver.homeBody: Review today's route, complete proofs, and handle cash prompts with minimal taps.
driver.setupBody: Review route basics, proof rules, and cash handling before you start work.
checklist: Confirm your phone is charged and location is on.
Review proof rules before your first stop.
Know where to get help if a stop cannot be completed.

hub.dashboardBody: Move work through intake, processing, QC, and dispatch from one operational surface.
hub.setupBody: Review intake, stage movement, and dispatch basics before processing live work.
checklist: Keep stage updates accurate and immediate.
Escalate blocked or failed items through help.

affiliate.dashboardBody: Create walk-in orders fast, track shop handovers, and review simple earnings visibility.
affiliate.staffSetupBody: Review walk-in intake, handover rules, and customer support handoff.
affiliate.adminSetupBody: Review shop activity, pickup readiness, and payout visibility before opening.
staffChecklist: Use the fast walk-in flow for every new shop order.
Confirm each handover clearly before release.
Use help when an order needs intervention.
adminChecklist: Review shop order flow and pickup readiness.
Check payout and balance visibility daily.
Use help for payout or access issues.
